description: A .NET 10 library ecosystem for building use-case-driven applications. Provides handler pipelines with FluentValidation, chain-of-responsibility, ASP.NET Core Minimal API integration with Problem Details, and Entity Framework Core utilities including auditable entities, soft delete, CQRS patterns, and pagination.
rules: DotEmilu targets .NET 10 and is distributed as four NuGet packages: DotEmilu.Abstractions, DotEmilu, DotEmilu.AspNetCore, and DotEmilu.EntityFrameworkCore
Package dependency chain: Abstractions (base) → DotEmilu (core) → AspNetCore; EntityFrameworkCore depends only on Abstractions
Handlers follow the pattern: Handler<TRequest> (no response) or Handler<TRequest, TResponse> (with response), always receiving an IVerifier<TRequest> for validation
ChainHandler<TChain> implements chain-of-responsibility via SetSuccessor() — used for multi-step pipelines like Validate → Enrich → Persist
Validation uses FluentValidation through IVerifier<TRequest>; manual errors can be added via verifier.AddValidationError()
For ASP.NET Core, HttpHandler wraps handlers into IResult producers; AsDelegate.ForAsync converts them to Minimal API delegates
IPresenter formats responses as RFC 7807 Problem Details; configured via ResultMessage in appsettings.json

Entity Framework Core: AuditableEntityInterceptor, SoftDeleteInterceptor, BaseEntityConfiguration, BaseAuditableEntityConfiguration with MappingStrategy (TPC/TPH/TPT); extensions UseIsDeleted(), AsPaginatedListAsync(), HasFormattedComment()

DI registration: AddDotEmilu() for ASP.NET Core, AddVerifier()/AddHandlers(assembly)/AddChainHandlers(assembly) for core, AddSoftDeleteInterceptor()/AddAuditableEntityInterceptors(assembly) for EF Core
Samples in /samples/ are runnable examples: ConsoleApp (8 handler scenarios), EntityFrameworkCore (7 EF patterns), FullApp (complete ASP.NET Core Web API), Domain (shared contracts and entities)
